Drop files or MIME-typed data onto an element, as if dragged from outside the page. At least one of "paths" or "data" must be provided.

Parse and extract text from rich/binary documents (e.g., PDF, DOCX, XLSX, PPTX) using MarkItDown. DO NOT use this for plain text or CSV files (use read_file_lines instead).
Read specific lines from a file. Supports reading lines from start to end (inclusive). Returns line numbers with content. Limited to 5MB files and MAX_READ_WINDOW lines.
Search for a keyword in a file.
Replace specific lines in a file with new code.
List files and directories within a given path.

Copy files from host system to virtual machine directory. Host file paths are copied to the specified VM directory (must start with /agent_vm/). Files are automatically renamed if they would overwrite existing files.
